prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-CARABINERSKEEPKEYSDIFFERENT-4 Product Type: CARABINER Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Aluminum Colored Carabiner Key Chain Spring Clip Small Size Assorted Colors Description: These colorful carabiners are a great way to keep your keys organized and easily accessible, whether they're in your purse, pocket or key bowl. They come in 7 different colors, so everyone will be able to keep their keys straight and color-coded.

Measuring in at just 2.5" long and 6mm thick, these carabiners are the perfect size for holding your keys and other key chains.

Grab some of these carabiners and never worry about misplacing your keys again.

Please note: these carabiners are not meant to be used for climbing. Color ships at random Search Terms: backpack keychain camping hiking outdoors Features: - Great For Key Chains - Dimensions: 2.5" x 6mm - 7 Different colors (Ships at random) - Colors Available: Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Black, Purple, White - Non load-bearing === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Small Aluminum Carabiner Key Chain Clip

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Small Colored Carabiner Key Chain Spring Clip

anthropic.title_differentiation: 7 Assorted Colors, 25 Inch, 6Mm Thick, Spring Clip, Lightweight Aluminum, Non Load-Bearing

openai.title_differentiation: 7 Color Assortment - 25 Inch By 6Mm - Non Load-Bearing - Key Organization - Backpack Hiking
